info.name: Salon Management System API
info.description: API collection for testing and managing the Salon Management System, including Customers, Employees, Services, Appointments, Invoices, Payments, Promotions, Feedback, Notifications, and Reports.

body.raw:
{
  "user": 2,
  "role_type": "staff",
  "full_name": "Tran Thi B",
  "phone": "0123456789",
  "specialties": "Hair Color, Styling, Scalp Treatment",
  "employment_status": "active"
}

{
  "name": "Luxury Haircut & Wash",
  "category": "Haircuts",
  "description": "Standard haircut + premium wash & style",
  "base_price": "250000.00",
  "duration_minutes": 45,
  "active": true,
  "status": "active"
}

{
  "name": "Summer Hair Care Promotion",
  "description": "20% off on all hair treatment services",
  "discount_type": "percent",
  "discount_value": "20.00",
  "starts_at": "2026-06-01T00:00:00Z",
  "ends_at": "2026-08-31T23:59:59Z",
  "active": true,
  "usage_limit": 200,
  "service_scope": []
}

{
  "customer": 1,
